debug_info.goal:
case some.none
𝕜 : Type u_2
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
r : ENNReal
f g : α → 𝕜
hr₀ : r ≠ 0
p : NNReal
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) none r
⊢ ‖f * g‖_[r] ≤ ‖f‖_[some p] * ‖g‖_[none]

failed_attempts:
have : r = p := by simpa using hpqr
    subst r
    refine (dLpNorm_le_of_norm_le (fun i ↦ ‖f i‖ * ‖g‖_[∞]) fun i ↦ ?_).trans_eq ?_
    · rw [norm_mul]
      exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (norm_le_dLinfty _ _) (norm_nonneg _)
    · simp [dLpNorm_smul, mul_comm]
  · sorry

have : r = p := by
      have := hpqr.inv_add_inv
      rwa [ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero, inv_inj] at this
      · exact hr₀
      · exact ENNReal.coe_ne_top
    subst this
    simp_rw [dLpNorm_eq_sum_nnnorm, nnnorm_mul, ENNReal.coe_mul]
    refine (ENNReal.rpow_le_rpow (Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ ↦ ?_) (by simp [hr₀])).trans_eq ?_
    · refine ENNReal.rpow_le_rpow (mul_le_mul_left' ?_ _) (by simp)
      exact (dLinftyNorm_eq_sup_nnnorm _).symm ▸ Finset.le_sup (Finset.mem_univ _)
    · simp_rw [← Finset.sum_mul, ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_nonneg _ _ (by simp [hr₀]), ← ENNReal.rpow_mul,
        mul_inv_cancel₀ (by simpa using hr₀), ENNReal.rpow_one, mul_comm]

have : r = p := by

      rwa [ENNReal.inv_inj] at hpqr
    subst this
    refine (dLpNorm_le_of_le fun i ↦ ?_).trans_eq ?_
    · rw [norm_mul, mul_comm]
      exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (dLpNorm_le_dLTopNorm g i) (norm_nonneg _)
    · rw [dLpNorm_smul, Real.norm_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg _), mul_comm]

have : p = r := by simpa [hr₀] using hpqr.def
    subst this
